top_signals.title: Musk Ally Gracias Stands to Make Billions Off SpaceX
top_signals.summary: Antonio Gracias, the founder of Valor Equity Partners and a longtime Elon Musk ally, controls a 7.3% stake in SpaceX, making him the second-largest holder after Musk himself that will earn the investor a giant windfall.

top_signals.title: Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
top_signals.summary: PinTheft, a recently patched Linux privilege escalation vulnerability, now has a publicly available proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit that allows local attackers to gain root privileges on Arch Linux systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
